free_text: Differential cross section and analyzing power for
elastic scattering of protons on Li-6 below 2.2 MeV
The Giessen polarization facility.
The polarization was measured in a second arrangement.
The C-Li(6)F target with 10 nm carbon and 100 nm
Li(6)F was used.
The phase-shift analysis.
The beam was focused through two apertures of
2.5 and 3 mm diameter to the exchangeable target in
the centre of the scattering chamber. Fourteen surface-
barrier detectors (Ortec, partially depleted -100 mum,
100 mm**2) surrounded the target with an overlap at
angle(lab)=90 degree(left-right arrangement).
The polarized H- current produced in
the Lamb-shift ion source was typically 1 muA.
Fig.4 (a,b,c) from Nucl.Phys.,A581(1995)93
